title: Multi-Processor Scheduling Approaches
description: A flowchart illustrating the different approaches and considerations for scheduling processes across multiple CPUs in a symmetric multiprocessing (SMP) system.
relationships: AMP uses a Master-Slave Architecture where one CPU handles all scheduling decisions
SMP allows any CPU to make scheduling decisions, requiring Synchronization for the Shared Queue
Processor Affinity attempts to keep a process on the same CPU to exploit cache locality
Load Balancing redistributes work from busy CPUs to idle CPUs to maximize utilization
